name: holosuite
description: Monorepo for the HoloSuite Foundry VTT sci-fi module suite.

scripts.pretest: tsc security-cameras/src/camera-model.ts security-cameras/src/region-geometry.ts security-cameras/src/frame-crop.ts security-cameras/src/token-projection.ts pulse-scanner/src/scan-geometry.ts pulse-scanner/src/target-model.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir .tmp-tests --skipLibCheck
scripts.verify: npm run audit && npm run check && npm run test && npm run build
